name: refactor-plan
description: Given a codebase problem (tech debt, complexity, poor structure), produce a step-by-step refactoring plan with risk assessment and rollback strategy.

problem_description.description: Description of the code problem to address

constraints.description: Constraints: backwards compatibility, timeline, test coverage requirements

steps.template:
Step 2 — Plan (ordered, incremental steps):
For each step:
- What to change
- Why (which problem it addresses)
- Risk level (low/medium/high)
- Verification: How to confirm it worked
- Rollback: How to undo if it breaks

Principles:
- Each step should be independently deployable
- Tests pass after every step
- No big-bang rewrites — incremental transformation
- Strangler fig pattern where applicable

Step 3 — Execution checklist:
- [ ] Ensure test coverage for affected code (add tests first)
- [ ] Create feature branch
- [ ] Execute steps in order, committing after each
- [ ] Run full test suite between steps
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] PR with before/after comparison

Estimated effort: [time]
Risk summary: [overall risk level and mitigation]
